description: Composition Black tights for men made of 84% polyester and 16% spandex, has an elasticated waistband and stitch detailing to Fit the exact specifications of championship athletes Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cool water with like colours Do not bleach, dry clean or use softners Do not iron Perfect for chamionship athletes, this pair of long johns is apt for your training sessions as they can be worn under your trackpants or shorts to keep you warm. The Dry-fit tecnology wicks sweat away, allowing you to train longer in comfort.
